subtitle: Deployed at State Bank of India (SBI GITC)
title: Systems Engineer — IDM & Infrastructure

bullets.text: Lead an operations team of 5 engineers supporting enterprise banking infrastructure and mission-critical IDM and database platforms for 30,000+ internal SBI branch users.
Maintain 99.999% system availability for Tier-1 banking applications across production, UAT, and DR environments — coordinating across infrastructure, database, application, and security teams.
Directly mentor 5 junior engineers, setting technical standards, conducting structured knowledge transfer sessions, and handling escalations.
Administer a fleet of 150+ Linux (RHEL) and Windows servers — automating patch management, access governance workflows, and incident response procedures.
Architected and executed Disaster Recovery drills and runbooks, reducing Recovery Time Objective (RTO) by 50% for Tier-1 applications.
Drive infrastructure modernisation by shifting from cloud-migration dependency to on-premise containerisation and Docker-based deployment workflows within banking compliance constraints.

subtitle: Technology and marketing lead for a family marine equipment venture
title: Technology & Product Lead · Family venture · Unpaid

bullets.text: Own all technology and product decisions for a zero-budget digital business: defined requirements, prioritised features, built and shipped every piece of the stack.

Built the full digital ecosystem: JAMstack storefront (Astro + Cloudflare Pages), eBay API automation, daily CI/CD rebuild pipeline, professional email infrastructure (SPF/DKIM/DMARC), and product analytics via PostHog.

Engineered a Python cold email automation agent integrating Brevo, Claude API, ZeroBounce, and Hunter.io — reduced time-to-listing by ~60%, targeting 200+ B2B prospects per campaign cycle with 90%+ inbox delivery.

Applied enterprise-grade engineering practices (observability, automation, structured testing) to a family business operating on zero budget — proving that constraints sharpen rather than limit product thinking.

subtitle: Technical interview readiness for engineering and management candidates
title: Technical Soft Skills Coach

bullets.text: Delivered technical interview readiness and executive communication coaching to 50+ engineering professionals and management candidates.
Designed a structured coaching curriculum covering STAR-method framing, technical storytelling, and senior-level interview strategy.
Sourced and managed end-to-end client relationships independently — from initial consultation through outcome tracking.
